allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('c:/code/pokedex-sandbox/data/pokemon.json'\)\); p=d[0]; print\(list\(p.keys\(\)\)\); print\('sprites:', list\(p.get\('sprites',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\('sprite sample:', str\(p.get\('sprites',{}\)\)[:300]\)")
